headline: Why Is Jacobs Solutions (J) Down 4.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Jacobs Solutions (J) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Jacobs awarded Scottish & Southern Electricity’s frameworks to strengthen UK energy cybersecurity and digital transformation
summary: DALLAS, June 04, 2026--Jacobs selected for multiple frameworks supporting the modernization and security of the north of Scotland’s electricity transmission network.

headline: Jacobs Awarded Multiple Strategic Frameworks By SSE With Potential Value $1B+ For Modernization And Security Of Northern Scotland's Power Grid
summary: With a combined potential value exceeding $1 billion, this work will span operational technology cybersecurity, substation design and digital services strengthening grid resilience and enabling greater renewable
